title: Anthropic Claude Docs
description: Official API reference and guides for building with Claude models, tool use, and agentic systems.

title: OpenAI Platform Docs
description: Complete reference for GPT models, Codex, Assistants API, structured outputs, and tool calling.

title: LangChain Documentation
description: Framework for building LLM-powered chains, agents, memory, and retrieval-augmented applications.

title: Hugging Face Docs
description: Hub, Transformers library, and ecosystem docs for open-source AI models, datasets, and spaces.

title: Papers With Code
description: Machine learning research papers with linked open-source implementations and benchmark results.

title: The Pragmatic Engineer
description: Gergely Orosz's newsletter on software engineering, engineering leadership, and the industry at large.

title: System Design Primer
description: Open-source guide to designing large-scale distributed systems with examples and interview prep.

title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
description: Martin Kleppmann's authoritative book on the engineering principles behind distributed data systems.

title: Architecture Patterns with Python
description: Free book on DDD, event-driven architecture, and ports & adapters patterns with practical Python examples.

title: MDN Web Docs
description: The definitive reference for web standards, HTML, CSS, JavaScript APIs, and browser compatibility.

title: A Tour of Go
description: Interactive, in-browser introduction to Go's syntax, concurrency primitives, and standard library.

title: freeCodeCamp
description: Free, project-based curriculum covering web development, data science, machine learning, and algorithms.

title: LeetCode
description: Coding challenges for algorithms, data structures, and system design — widely used for technical interviews.

title: The Odin Project
description: Full-stack web development curriculum built with projects, from absolute beginner to job-ready.
